name: indieappstack-content-affiliate
description: Editorial, affiliate, and analytics operating system for IndieAppStack.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, write, monetize, and improve IndieAppStack content.
interface.longDescription: A dedicated operating plugin for IndieAppStack that coordinates editorial planning, high-quality article production, affiliate program intake, link placement, and performance review.
defaultPrompt: Plan the next IndieAppStack publishing sprint.
Create an article brief for a tool comparison.
Review affiliate performance and recommend updates.
